name: Half Moon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar, shortening, and eggs until smooth.
2. Set aside.
3. Mix together the flour, baking powder, and soda in a separate bowl.
4. Set aside.
5. Combine the buttermilk with the soda.
6. Alternate adding the dry ingredients mixture and the buttermilk mixture into the creamed mixture, stirring gently after each addition.
7. Form 1/4 cup portions of dough into balls on a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly golden.
9. Allow to cool completely before frosting half with white frosting and half with chocolate frosting.
